---
title: "About Me"
---

## Background

My name is Oliver Reece. I hold a B.A. in Quantitative Economics, Minor in Statistics & Data Science from Lawrence University. 
At Lawrence (outside of my studies) I competed on the NCAA Men's Fencing Team, and held part-time jobs in both the on-campus bar, 
and in the office of SEAL (Student Engagement, Activities, and Leadership). 
I have a passion for investing and quantitative research, and as such intend to merge these together into a career where 
I make meaningful investments that would lead to the betterment of the world I live in all, while developing as an 
individual, an academic, and a professional.

## Academic Interests

- Data Analysis and Data Manipulation
- Machine learning and Predictive Modeling  
- Economics & Quantitative Research
- Investment and Portfolio Management
- Financial Modelling

## Extracurricular Interests

- Snowboarding
- Mountain Biking
- Football (Soccer)
- Fencing
- Hiking
- Camping

## Contact Information

If you need to reach me, feel free to reach me at my [email](mailto:oliver.j.reece66@gmail.com)
or via [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/oliver-reece).
